Name: 12 FIRES Winery & Vineyard
Full_Address: 12 Twelve Fires Rd, Johnson City, Texas 78636
Description: Step into the enchanting world of 12 FIRES Tasting Room, your gateway to the soul of Texas wine country. No need for reservations if you’re a group under 12 – simply stroll in and immerse yourself in our state-of-the-art tasting room, set amidst the serene oak grove overlooking our vineyard. Families are warmly welcomed, including furry friends on leashes, with plenty of games and activities to keep everyone entertained. Experience the perfect blend of rustic charm and refined sophistication at 12 FIRES. Indulge in our curated selection of Charcuterie Boards and savor the tantalizing flavors of our special “Martins Nutz,” a delightful fusion of Texas pecans. All while delighting in the exquisite taste of our 100% Texas wines. Relax, unwind, and let the magic of our tasting experience transport you to a realm of pure bliss.

Name: Ab Astris Winery
Description: We are a family-owned, boutique winery dedicated to producing handcrafted vintages in the heart of the Texas Hill Country. Located next to the LBJ National Park, come enjoy a glass of 100% Texas wine under our oak grove while looking onto our twelve acre Estate vineyard. Guests enjoy live music, elevated tasting experiences and events throughout the year. At Ab Astris, we are All Texas, All the Time.

Name: Adega Vinho Winery
Description: Adega Vinho is a family-owned winery in Stonewall, TX. Rooted in thoughtful farming practices and traditional winemaking, the Bilger Family produces 100% Texas wine with a tip of their hat to the Portuguese style of wines. Visitors can enjoy tastings in a mid-century modern-inspired space, savor wood-fired cuisine from the on-site food truck, and experience the warmth of a community built around exceptional Texas wine.

Name: Airis'Ele Vineyards
Description: Pronounced (Air-is-L) No gimmicks just great wine. The beautiful tasting room allows for various picturesque panoramic views of the grove overlooking century old oak trees all while enjoying an intimate seated tasting experience. Wine and picnic items are available so guests can enjoy the covered patio or grounds to immerse in nature. We are a local family owned and operated winery, we encourage guests, friends and family to visit, relax, engage, and honor the traditions of gatherings – our handcrafted wines beckon just that.

Name: Arch Ray Winery
Description: Experience fine wine, dining and top-notch hospitality at one of Fredericksburg’s newest destination spots, Arch Ray Winery. Located on HWY 290, the beautiful Arch Ray estate offers a peaceful setting to kick back and stay awhile. Enjoy wine, beer and spirits amongst spectacular views.

Name: Becker Vineyards
Description: Featured in Wine Spectator, Food & Wine, Bon Appetit, and served at The White House, our hand crafted, award-wining Bordeaux, Burgundian, and Rhone styled wines are enjoyed with fine cuisine or casual fare. Wine Club, Library Tastings, “Chef’s Table” experiences, Lavender Fest, food & wine pairings, public & private tours, tastings, event center, Veranda & Pavilion await. Dogs are loved and kids are welcome!

Name: Bell Springs Winery
Full_Address: 3700 Bell Springs Rd, Dripping Springs, Texas 78620
Hours: HOURS: See website for current hours
Description: Bell Springs Winery & Brewery, in the beautiful hills of Dripping Springs, is the perfect place to relax and lounge on the patio under our majestic oaks, where the country breeze will remind you that you’re far from the daily grind. Live music and gourmet local fare can be enjoyed while taking in the views and sipping our variety of carefully-crafted wines and beers. We are dog/kid-friendly - bring the whole crew!

Name: Bending Branch Winery
Description: Visit the Tannat House of Texas Thursday through Monday. Bending Branch is known for its big wines – from the high acidity in Picpoul Blanc to the bold tannins in Tannat and Sagrantino. Bending Branch 1840 and ChickenDuck bourbons are also available for tastings. Don’t miss the Derby Extravaganza the first Saturday in May. Voted Best Winery in the 2024 San Antonio Express-News Readers’ Choice Awards for the ninth consecutive year.

Name: Bingham Family Vineyards
Description: Explore one of the largest selections of 100% Texas grown estate wines across Texas at our Hye, Roanoke, Grapevine, or Meadow locations. At Hye, Texas we have our Hill Country vineyard view, picnic area, and light food items to enjoy with our quality wines, knowing both the grapes and the wine were produced by the Bingham team in the Texas High Plains AVA in Meadow, Texas. See our website to plan your visit.

Name: Blue Lotus Winery
Description: Enjoy our award-winning wines and meads from our wine barrel shaped tasting room with distant views of the Texas countryside. Our wines and meads are 100% Texan. You can enjoy our carefully crafted wines and meads in either our Hye or Seguin tasting rooms.

Name: Carter Creek Winery
Hours: HOURS: Open Daily, see website for hours
Description: Visit the tasting room at Carter Creek Winery and delight in some of the Hill Country’s finest Texas wines. Winemaker Jon McPherson was raised in the Texas viticulture, as his father was Dr. Clinton “Doc” McPherson, a pioneer of the modern Texas wine industry. McPherson focuses on “letting the vineyards speak.” Highlights include crisp whites and robust reds. The Peach Sparkling is also an award- winning favorite. Discover your new favorite from our selection of Texas-grown grape varietals.

Name: Driftwood Estate Winery
Description: Awarded “Top Texas Wine” for our Longhorn Red. Featured in Wine Spectator’s 10 Best Wine Travel Destinations, our small boutique winery is only 25 minutes from Austin. 6 miles S of Hwy 290 on RR 12 between Dripping Springs and Wimberley. Award winning wines made from 100% Texas grapes. Wine club, tasting, gift shop, Bistro, pavilion and spectacular hilltop view overlooking our vineyard. Now serving Craft Brewed Beer. Adults only 21 and over, see website.

Name: Dry Comal Creek Vineyards
Description: Located just outside of New Braunfels and Gruene on Highway 46, the closest vineyard to San Antonio on the Hill Country Wine Trail. Join us for fun and relaxation including our amazing 100% Texas wines. Reservations for our tastings are highly encouraged. Our tastings are all seated, and narrated by our witty and knowledgeable ambassadors. Check out our schedule for events, music, food trucks, and member only events.

Name: Duchman Family Winery
Full_Address: 13308 Ranch to Market Rd 150, Driftwood, Texas 78619
Description: 100% Texas Grapes. 100% Texas Wines. That is the philosophy behind Duchman Family Winery. We work with the top growers in the state, select the varietals best suited for Texas, and adhere to exacting standards in the winery in order to produce world class wines from our home in Driftwood, Texas. Our nationally recognized facility includes a tasting room, spacious event center, and vineyard views for your special occasion.

Name: Elisa Christopher Wines
Description: Elisa Christopher Wines’ mission is to produce premier Texas wines that establishes a national destination for wine connoisseurs. Our facilities will raise the bar in the State of Texas for experience, elegance, and sustainable practices. Our core values are exceptional wines, exquisite hospitality, and memorable experiences. Our Customers come for the love of wine, a desire for a memorable experience, and a place to relax off the beaten path, unwind and enjoy the beauty of the Texas Hill Country. Come for the wine and stay for the company.

Name: Fall Creek Vineyards Driftwood
Description: Fall Creek Vineyards, awarded “TOP TEXAS WINERY ” and named “Top 101 Wineries in US”, crafts 100% Terroir-driven Texas wines. Savor our locally grown, internationally known wines, enjoy the beauty of our two wineries, welcoming hospitality of our knowledgeable staff and TASTE the DIFFERENCE! Plan your private party, corporate event or wedding and visit daily for tours, tastings, monthly events. Corporate office: 512-476-4477

Name: Farmhouse Vineyards
Full_Address: 402 E Main St, Johnson City, Texas 78636
Hours: HOURS: Wed-Thur 12pm-6pm, Fri-Sat 11am-6pm, Sun 12pm-6pm, Mon-Tue CLOSED
Description: In 2023/24 Multiple award recipients for outstanding “Natural Resources Conservation” reflecting our deep-rooted history & love for the land. FHV offers a Tasting House + the only Private “Airstream” tasting in “TX Wine Country.” Indulgent charcuterie & cheese boards + Farm “Provisions,” served with exceptional hospitality. Our 100% Estate supplies fruit to the top 20 wineries in TX & our brand. Curious about #WhosYourFarmer? Lodging available.

Name: Fiesta Winery Lometa
Description: This Flagship Fiesta Winery location, including production facilities, our estate vineyard, and primary offices, offers a front-row seat to picturesque views you can only experience in the northern Hill Country. We are open daily to bring you superior wine, delectable food, and outstanding hospitality. Check out our social media to learn about our many events, which provide you with the perfect reason to Fiesta with us.

Name: Fiesta Winery at Arch Ray
Description: Located at Arch Ray, one of Fredericksburg’s newest hotspots, Fiesta Winery at Arch Ray offers a vast wine selection in a welcoming atmosphere, where everyone is sure to find a reason to Fiesta. Visit our secondary Fredericksburg tasting room on Main Street, where you can enjoy a wine tasting or glass of your choosing while shopping Savy Ray’s Boutique, located in an adjoined retail space.

Name: Flat Creek Estate
Full_Address: 24912 Singleton Bend E, Marble Falls, Texas 78654
Description: Located on the northshore of Lake Travis, Flat Creek encompasses an 80 acre estate with a full-service restaurant, a dedicated tasting room and an expansive outdoor pavilion with live music every weekend. With plenty of outdoor space, it´s the perfect place to bring the whole family, kids and dogs included!

Name: Fredericksburg Winery
Description: We make wine for everybody and walk-ins are always welcome! Our family has been making wine from 100% Texas grapes on Main Street since 1996. You’ll find a complete spectrum of reds and whites, drys and sweets, and late-harvest desserts. We believe the only thing you need to know about wine is what you like. So, come stop by and taste for yourself. Conserve Texas Water. Drink Texas Wine.

Name: Grape Creek Vineyards
Description: An oasis for wine explorers. Experience 25 acres of idyllic vineyards and Tuscan-inspired tasting rooms paired with our 90+ point wines at this ultimate wine destination. Sample our portfolio of wines during a tasting or guided winery tour, or elevate your wine venture with a private, seated tasting of our luxurious, ultra-premium collection. Members can enjoy wine service on the vineyard patios or our on-site dining.

Name: Grape Creek on Main
Description: Sample wines in our historic upscale urban tasting room in downtown Fredericksburg. Our unique tasting experiences allow you to try our diverse wine collections, including Heath Sparkling Wines, Invention Vineyards, Jenblossom Cellars and Grape Creek Vineyards. Our 90+ point wines are crafted at our production wineries right here in Fredericksburg. Members can also enjoy wine service at the seated Member bar.

Name: Hawk's Shadow Estate Winery
Description: 100% Texas Grown. At Hawk’s Shadow, you are greeted by our family & commanding vistas of vineyard & Texas Hill Country. Wine tasting at Hawk’s Shadow features relaxed seating where you will enjoy an eclectic mix of dry complex whites, rich European style reds & very small production wines that offer unique vintage or vineyard specific character. Find a shaded table to relax over a glass, bottle or picnic with a friend.

Name: Heath Sparkling Wines
Description: 90+ point sparkling wines paired with Chef-inspired small bites. Experience this unique, multi-sensory wine tasting in our architecturally stunning tasting room with panoramic vineyard views. Learn about the art of sparkling winemaking through a virtual “tour“ throughout your tasting. Members also enjoy wine service and small bites from our patios nestled amongst the picturesque estate vineyards.

Name: Hilmy Cellars
Description: Hilmy Cellars is a family-owned, artisan Texas winery. We specialize in producing wines of the highest quality using traditional European techniques and focusing on hot-weather varietals, which harness the terroir of Texas. Our team will guide you through a tasting and help you find the perfect bottle or glass to enjoy on our beautiful patio overlooking our estate vineyards, and to take home. Come see what Texas wine can do!

Name: Hye Meadow Winery
Description: Visit the Batek’s winery & vineyard on 62 oak-shaded acres in Hye, betwixt Johnson City & Fredericksburg. Enjoy 100% Texas wine made onsite by our hands, nibble on a cheese plate or learn more on a winery tour about our big reds! Our tasting room looks over hill country views with three decks, covered outdoor limestone bar or visit our private wine club member lounge. We invite you to getaway from the ordinary!

Name: Invention Vineyards
Description: Everything you're looking for in a Texas winery located just 5 minutes from downtown Fredericksburg. Experience 35 acres of estate vineyards, a stunning, industrially-chic tasting room and 90+ point wine collection. Enjoy sweeping views of the vineyard estate during a guided tasting led by our wine ambassadors or a sparkling winery production tour. Members can also enjoy wine service and small bites on the vineyard patios.

Name: Inwood Estates Vineyards
Description: Named “Top 101 Wineries in America” by the Daily Meal, NY, serving 100% Texas’ finest wines. Winemaker Dan Gatlin, now in his 43rd year, who pioneered Tempranillo in Texas and son, Spencer Gatlin in his 12th year, have become a Father-Son Team and known for Bordeaux varietals grown locally and in West Texas that have equaled or surpassed their legacy of Tempranillo. Expect the Hill Country’s most extensive & educational wine experience. Enjoy a wine friendly menu in the Bistro, on the Deck, or in The Grove next to the 100+ year-old vine. Also, visit us in Dallas.

Name: Kalasi Cellars
Description: For five generations, our family has been farming various crops in India. Today, we’re keeping that heritage alive in Texas. At our boutique winery located just minutes from downtown Fredericksburg, we’ve set out to create world-class Texas wines - starting with the grapes we grow ourselves. From our Malbec to our Teroldego, each one of our wines was made to be savored. Come experience A Heritage Reincarnated!

Name: Kerrville Hills Winery
Description: Kerrville Hills Winery was one of the first Hill Country Wineries opening in 2008. Kerrville Hills renowned winemaker, John Rivenburgh, is dedicated to handcrafted wines of notoriety and traditional winemaking. Now located on the majestic Schreiner University campus, guests enjoy an in-town experience with amazing Hill Country views and quality wines in a historic 1905 ranch house. We hope you find a home away from home here at KHW, where the entire family is welcome.

Name: K Estate
Description: A captivating wine experience awaits at K Estate complete with lush estate vineyards, a production winery and Texas wines. Take in the stunning vineyard views during any of our tasting experiences including a guided tasting of current vintages or a paired tasting with chef-inspired small bites. Members can enjoy wine service on the vineyard patios or our on-site bistro dining.

Name: La Vie Estate Winery
Hours: HOURS: Thur-Sun 11-6pm, Sun 12-5pm.  Changes in summer months, see website.
Description: La Vie Estate overlooks the stunning Blanco River Valley. The terraced terrain provides amazing views and breezes, reminiscent of lakeside European vineyards. The Lookout Tasting Room features a rustic atmosphere with a large deck and silo gazebo, perfect for relaxing and sipping a glass of wine while enjoying the sunset views. 100% Texas wines.

Name: Lewis Wines
Hours: HOURS: Fri-Sun 10:30-5, accept walk-ins & by appointment
Description: Established in 2010 by Doug Lewis and Duncan Mcnabb, Lewis Wines makes 100% Texas wine with a mindset that wine is made in the vineyard. We source our grapes from all over Texas and work closely with our grape growers to produce wines that truly highlight the taste of the diverse microclimates under cultivation in Texas today. Our Tasting Room has a laid back atmosphere and space for the whole family, pups included!

Name: Limestone Terrace Vineyard
Full_Address: 113 E Park St, Ste 300, Fredericksburg, Texas 78624
Description: Limestone Terrace Vineyard is just a short distance off Main Street in downtown Fredericksburg. We craft bold, Mediterranean-style wines from 100% Texas- grown grapes sourced from both the Hill Country and High Plains. Visit our shared tasting room with Buli Wines of Tuscany for a one-of-a-kind experience that blends Tuscan charm with Texas grit.

Name: Longhorn Cellars
Description: Longhorn Cellars is a boutique winery featuring wines produced and vinted in the Texas Hill Country. Order wines by the glass and enjoy our nice patio seating or lounge comfortably in our spacious, ranch inspired tasting room. Visit Brix and Tannins, our 2 Longhorn mascots. Come relax and stay awhile!

Name: Lost Draw Wines
Description: Lost Draw is a fully integrated vineyard and winery operation that prides itself in a farming first approach to all aspects of production. We are committed to farming our own grapes to ensure we consistently produce the highest quality Texas-grown wines. Visit us for an educational wine tasting, an elevated food & wine pairing, or for one of our signature events held at our beautiful estate throughout the year.

Name: Meierstone Vineyards
Description: Meierstone Vineyards is a boutique, family-owned winery with elevated wine and deep historical roots. The tasting room resides on the fifth generation, 555-acre working Meierstone Farm & Ranch between Stonewall and Hye. With 100% Texas grapes, female winemaker and granddaughter, Krystal, creates premium, small-batch wines with every vintage. Voted “TOP TEXAS WINE” - 2024 Houston International Wine Competition.

Name: Messina Hof Hill Country Winery
Description: Exceptional Texas wine from the most awarded winery in Texas. Messina Hof Hill Country Winery is the perfect stop to relax in beautiful Hill Country. Featuring a vineyard, spacious tasting room, covered patios, and the largest portfolio of premium Texas wines, we welcome you to visit and Join the Family™. Stay overnight in our B&B, savor light bites, and drink wine with Texas soul.

Name: Michael Ros Winery
Full_Address: 982 Old San Antonio Rd, Fredericksburg, Texas 78624
Description: Michael Ros Winery is a family-owned boutique winery dedicated to crafting high quality 100% Texas wine. Our tasting room, located just 1 mile off Hwy 290 on 38 scenic acres, offers a peaceful escape from the hustle and bustle. Surrounded by nature, our uniquely designed space enhances the ambiance, and our award-winning wines make every visit a truly memorable experience.

Name: Narrow Path Winery
Description: Narrow Path Winery and Vineyard is nestled in the hills above the Williams Creek Valley set away from the hurried pace of the 290 Wine Road. Come take the time to enjoy award winning wines and spectacular views. Traditionally styled wines are contrasted with a beautiful modern tasting room with views of our vineyard and the rural backdrop of the Texas Hill Country.

Name: Pebble Rock Cellars
Hours: HOURS: Sat 11-5pm, Sun 12-5pm. Tastings by appointment only. Will accept walk-ins if space available.
Description: Discover our quaint tasting room hidden in plain sight in Johnson City. We offer an intimate and welcoming wine tasting experience, whether you're a seasoned connoisseur or just beginning your wine journey. Tastings last an hour to an hour and fifteen minutes and include an interactive educational experience.  Reservations are highly recommended, and we look forward to seeing you soon.

Name: Pedernales Cellars
Description: Celebrating a 30-year grape growing tradition, Pedernales Cellars is committed to providing visitors with an exceptional, wine country experience. Enjoy the panoramic views from our inviting tree lined deck, while sipping wines crafted with a sustainable focus on the land. Owned and operated by sixth generation Texans, Pedernales Cellars welcomes you to visit and enjoy, Seriously. Texas Wine.

Name: Pontotoc Vineyard Picnic Table
Description: 100% TEXAS HILL COUNTRY WINE: Picnic Table is housed in a refurbished 1940s gas station amidst a stand of live oaks on the Texas Wine Trail and provides a roadside park setting for sharing a picnic of homemade food and local wine. Our mission is to make vintage wines of exceptional quality from grapes grown solely in the Texas Hill Country. We are a fifth generation Texas farming family and take great pride in bringing the fruit of our labor to your table.

Name: Portree Cellars
Description: Enjoy breathtaking panoramic views of the hill country and our vineyards while relaxing with a glass of Portree Cellars wine in the comfort of our modern and inviting tasting room. Our boutique family-owned winery aims to please with award-winning wines made from grapes across the state. Enjoy the artistic vibe, some light food and a game of bocce. Dogs welcome on leash on our outdoor patios. 100% Texas, All the Time.

Name: Saint Tryphon Farm & Vineyards
Description: REAL. TEXAS. WINE. Saint Tryphon, patron of grape growers & gardeners lived in the 3rd century. At his namesake vineyard & winery we strive to honor his patronage in field & cellar. Our goal: place & pleasure from 100% Texas grapes. Our estate vineyard & tasting room are located south of Sisterdale & north of Boerne on 1376. 2019 San Antonio Express-news Top 100 Dining & Drinks: 2018 San Antonio Express-News Top 3 Texas Winery.

Name: Siboney Cellars
Hours: HOURS: Mon 12-5pm, Closed Tue-Wed, Thur 11-8pm, Fri-Sun 11-6pm
Description: A modern hillside winery overlooks the terraced estate vineyard. Every seat offers commanding Hill Country views. An All-Texas wine portfolio, by Barbara Lecuona, is the heart of a culinary-wine-cigar Culture Vibe unlike any other. Siboney. Just You Wait! Founded in 2017 by Miguel and Barbara Lecuona, and later joined by partners Bill and Mary Anne Waldrip, Siboney built a beautiful production and tasting facility, with estate vineyards, in 2021. Located 4 miles west of Johnson City on US Highway 290, Siboney creates and sells a critically acclaimed portfolio of 100% Texas Wines on site through tastings, wine clubs and  distributed through an elite restaurant list. The energetic calendar of events offers the some of the most unique culinary, cultural, and casual experiences in the Hill Country.  Siboney joined the THCW in May, 2025.

Name: Signor Vineyards
Description: The Signors are a family of farmers, ranchers, and horticulturalists with a long history of working Texas lands. Signor Vineyards carries on that tradition in the Texas Hill Country, cultivating an appreciation of Texas agriculture for generations to come. Founded in 2015 with our first seven varietals planted, we’ve continued to craft Texas wines and now expanding into a second vineyard in a new AVA—Fort Davis, Texas. Signor offers seated tastings, glass and bottle service on our scenic great lawn, along with gourmet sandwiches and curated home goods at Joanna's Market. Visit us at our main vineyard or at our downtown Fredericksburg location on Orange Street for an elevated experience—or simply to enjoy a great glass of wine.

Name: Silver Dollar Winery
Description: Since 2015, wine enthusiasts have enjoyed our over 30 sweet, semi-sweet & dry Award Winning White, Rose’ & Red wines at our Texas Family owned boutique winery in Johnson City/Hye. Experience our Bistro with Italian inspired charcuterie, appetizers, pasta dishes & Artisan Pizzas. Drink and dine in our scenic outdoor gardens. Hill Country cabins available. Our goal is to bring you great wines and good times with your friends and family.

Name: Sister Creek Vineyards
Hours: HOURS: Open Daily, see website for operation hours
Description: Celebrating our 36th anniversary of producing award winning wines! Take this scenic route to Fredericksburg and visit an 1885 cotton gin in historic Sisterdale. Wines include Cabernet blends, Muscat Canelli, Chardonnay, Merlot and Sweet Sister Red.

Name: Slate Theory Winery
Description: Slate Theory Winery invites guests to “Fill Your Head” and prescribes a full- sensory experience that manifests in the form of psychologically stimulating and award-winning wine. The tasting room is set to the sounds of modern music, enriched with perceptive art, and curated by knowledgeable staff. For those seeking individualized wine tastings, the cave is an unexpected manifestation of complex and elemental architecture.

Name: Solaro Estate Winery
Full_Address: 13111 Silver Creek Rd, Dripping Springs, Texas 78620
Description: In the beginning we wanted to be, above all else, authentic. Built on an ancient fossil bed, we produce int’l awarded wines. Named Texas Winery of the Year & Texas Hill Country Winery of the Year NYIWC, our working ranch, vineyards and winery in Dripping Springs expands above Barton Creek with spectacular vistas of the Texas Hill Country. See y’all at Solaro!

Name: Spicewood Vineyards
Description: Home of award-winning estate handcrafted wines from our 32 acre vineyard on site. Hwy 71 go south 7/10 mile on CR 408, then west 1.5 miles on CR 409. Tempranillo, Sauvignon Blanc and many other favorite varietals. Picnic on our veranda. Winemaker tours and tastings. Special event facilities available. We are the wedding venue choice of discerning Texas Brides.

Name: Stone House Vineyard
Hours: HOURS: Thur-Mon, see website for hours
Description: Beautiful setting on Lake Travis surrounded by vineyards producing award-winning wines 35 minutes from Austin. The winery is constructed with massive limestone blocks, making it both functional and a building of artistic, architectural merit. First Friday specials, monthly wine dinners, private events, and an elevated guest experience. Enjoy a daily menu prepared by our chef from locally sourced ingredients.  Age 21+

Name: Texas Heritage Vineyard
Description: With wines made from 100% Texas grapes to celebrations of Texas History Days, Texas Heritage Vineyard is proud of their Texas roots! Not only do they have a beautiful hill country view off of their back deck, you can listen to Texas musicians playing their songs every weekend afternoon. Discounts for military offered daily. Family owned and operated.

Name: Texas Hills Vineyard
Hours: HOURS: Sun-Mon 11-5, Tue-Wed CLOSED, Thur, Fri, Sat 11-8:30 (tasting room closes at 5:30, Speakeasy Red Room open until 8:30)
Description: The Texas Wine Trail Starts Here! Over the last 25 years, Texas Hills Vineyard has been one of the most award-winning wineries in the heart of the famed Texas Hill Country. Texas Hills founders started the Texas Wine Trail on their kitchen table. There are now over 60 wineries on the Trail. Please come join us at our table and try some of our award-winning wine. Tasting Room and Gift Shop Open Daily.

Name: Texas Wine Collective
Description: Texas Wine Collective, the first wine collective in the Texas Hill Country, sets the standard for authentic hospitality, presents wines from multiple Texas winemakers, including Brennan Vineyards, Lost Oak Winery, and McPherson Cellars, and is home to Hye Cider. TWC provides expansive outdoor seating, live music on Saturday afternoons, a food truck, and elevated tasting experiences by appt. Children and dogs are always welcome.

Name: Torr Na Lochs Vineyard
Description: Torr Na Lochs loosely translates from Gaelic to Hill Over Lakes. The Winery sits high above the Colorado River valley overlooking Inks & Buchanan Lakes. The leisurely drive along a granite gravel road ends at the winery building, where you can choose from a number of seating options for tasting 100% Texas wines poured at your table by our friendly staff. Stop by, relax, savor creations from our in house chef, and enjoy the wine and view!

Name: Turtle Creek Olives and Vines
Description: Our Tasting room located inside a Landmark 1890 Masonic Building in historic downtown Kerrville offers a distinctive tasting experience. Our guests enjoy our 100% Texas and Estate Private Label Wines as well as curated wines from respected regions around the world. Enjoy charcuterie, small plates as well as our custom made EVOO gelato. Wine Club/monthly sommelier educational events.

Name: Turtle Creek Vineyard
Description: Turtle Creek Vineyard is the perfect place to relax with a glass of our 100% Texas wines overlooking amazing vistas of Turtle Creek. We are located just 8 miles south of downtown Kerrville off Highway 16. We are family owned and operated that takes pride in the wine produced at our Vineyard. We are dedicated to creating boutique quality wines of award-winning caliber.

Name: Uplift Vineyard
Description: Founded by the team behind William Chris, Uplift Vineyard sits in the Llano Uplift geological region, one of the most unique and desirable spots to grow wine in the Texas Hill Country. Winemaker Claire Richardson seeks to explore and celebrate all that the site has to offer through estate-grown single variety wines as well as classic blends. At Uplift, we offer an intimate and interactive tasting experience.

Name: Wedding Oak Winery Burnet
Hours: HOURS: See website for operating hours
Description: Our historic hospitality center and tasting room highlights the restoration of the historic two-story 1883 Badger Building including a rooftop terrace, large patio, event area, and elevator for easy access. We are deeply committed to 100% Texas Viticulture. Experience exceptional wines and great service on the courthouse square. Our Texas Roots Run Deep!

Name: Wedding Oak Winery Fredericksburg
Full_Address: 6009 Suite B US, Hwy 290 E, Fredericksburg, Texas 78624
Hours: HOURS: See website for operating hours
Description: Come enjoy our wines of purpose, grown from 100% Texas wine grapes, as you relax with your family and friends along the hustle and bustle of Wine Road 290. Located directly across from Alstadt Brewery. Our Texas Roots Run Deep!

Name: Wedding Oak Winery San Saba
Hours: HOURS: See website for operating hours
Description: Located in downtown San Saba at the intersection of US 190 & State Hwy 16, our beautiful tasting room showcases a restored 1926 building and courtyard. We are deeply committed to Texas viticulture and our wines feature warm weather varietals such as Tempranillo, Viognier, Trebbiano, Sangiovese and Muscat Canelli. Come enjoy exceptional wines and great service in an intimate small-town setting. Our Texas Roots Run Deep!

Name: Wildseed Farms & Winery
Description: Extraordinary wines begin with exceptional grapes. In 2015, the Thomas family put five generations of farming experience into the planting of their first vineyard. Currently the vineyard has expanded to 55 acres. Wildseed Vineyards is proud to serve white varieties, a rosé, and multiple red wines produced from the estate grown fruit. You can taste the dedication to the vineyard when enjoying wines from Wildseed Vineyards.

Name: William Chris Vineyards
Description: At William Chris Vineyards, we focus on responsibly grown, 100% Texas wine. In addition to farming our vineyards, we work with family-owned farms across the state to source the highest quality fruit. We believe the best wines are ones that express their native terroir. That’s why you’ll hear us say, we are pleased to share a piece of our world. In fall 2022 the World’s Best Vineyards Academy released its annual Top 100 Best Vineyards list, and William Chris Vineyards was listed at #56! All tasting experiences can be found on our website - plan your visit! Real.Texas.Wine.
